creator: theis@gmx.at
text:
Am 12.06.2013 18:23, schrieb Sayetsky Anton:
> 2013/6/12 Christoph Theis <theis@gmx.at>:
>> PORTREVISION must be bumped when the port shall be reinstalled.
>> As this is just a cleanup of files and doesn't change any installed files I
>> don't think it is necessary.
> Please, take a look at action.d/bsd-ipfw.conf or action.d/pf.conf.
> There are duplicates of sections, e.g.:
> jason@jw:/usr/local/etc/fail2ban/action.d$ cat bsd-ipfw.conf | grep Definition
> [Definition]
> [Definition]
> jason@jw:/usr/local/etc/fail2ban/action.d$ cat pf.conf | grep Definition
> [Definition]
> [Definition]
>
> So I think that reinstallation of fail2ban is necessary.

OK, you are right.


Christoph
